issues.reference: [u1] The board approved a $2.4 million operating budget.
issues.candidate: The board approved a $4.2 million operating budget.

issues.reference: [u1] The motion to renew the lease was approved.
issues.candidate: The motion to renew the lease was rejected.

issues.reference: [u1] The migration is scheduled for September 18.
issues.candidate: The migration is scheduled for August 18.

issues.reference: [u1] Priya owns the customer follow-up.
issues.candidate: Marcus owns the customer follow-up.

issues.reference: [u1] The compliance report is due Friday.
issues.candidate: The compliance report has no deadline.

issues.reference: [u1] Engineering will disable the legacy endpoint after launch.
issues.candidate: Engineering will keep the legacy endpoint enabled after launch.

issues.reference: [u1] The accessibility review remains pending.
issues.candidate: The accessibility review is complete.

issues.reference: [u1] The team identified a high risk of supplier delay.
issues.candidate: The team reported no supplier-delivery risk.

issues.reference: [u1] The committee selected Northstar as the vendor.
issues.candidate: The committee selected Bluewater as the vendor.

issues.reference: [u1] The training will be held in the Chicago office.
issues.candidate: The training will be held remotely.

issues.reference: [u1] The proposal passed by a vote of seven to two.
issues.candidate: The proposal passed unanimously.

issues.reference: [u1] Phase one includes billing and account migration only.
issues.candidate: Phase one also includes the analytics rewrite.

issues.reference: [u1] The Thursday review was cancelled.
issues.candidate: The Thursday review remains scheduled.

issues.reference: [u1] Marketing agreed to reduce campaign spending by 15 percent.
issues.candidate: Marketing agreed to increase campaign spending by 15 percent.

issues.reference: [u1] Elena will prepare the incident timeline.
issues.candidate: The legal team will prepare the incident timeline.

issues.reference: [u1] Launch depends on completion of the security audit.
issues.candidate: Launch does not depend on the security audit.

issues.reference: [u1] The group issued a no-go decision for the June launch.
issues.candidate: The group approved the June launch.

issues.reference: [u1] Jordan committed to deliver the prototype next week.
issues.candidate: Jordan declined to deliver a prototype.

issues.reference: [u1] The security team required multifactor authentication for administrators.
issues.candidate: The security team made administrator multifactor authentication optional.

issues.reference: [u1] Customer recordings must be deleted after 30 days.
issues.candidate: Customer recordings may be retained indefinitely.

issues.reference: [u1] The board approved a $2.4 million operating budget.
issues.candidate: The board approved the $2.4 million operating budget.

issues.reference: [u1] The motion to renew the lease was approved.
issues.candidate: Members approved renewing the lease.

issues.reference: [u1] The migration is scheduled for September 18.
issues.candidate: The migration date is September 18.

issues.reference: [u1] Priya owns the customer follow-up.
issues.candidate: Priya will handle the customer follow-up.

issues.reference: [u1] The compliance report is due Friday.
issues.candidate: The team must submit the compliance report by Friday.

issues.reference: [u1] Engineering will disable the legacy endpoint after launch.
issues.candidate: The legacy endpoint will be disabled by Engineering after launch.

issues.reference: [u1] The accessibility review remains pending.
issues.candidate: The accessibility review is still pending.

issues.reference: [u1] The team identified a high risk of supplier delay.
issues.candidate: Supplier delay remains a high risk.

issues.reference: [u1] The committee selected Northstar as the vendor.
issues.candidate: Northstar was selected as the vendor.

issues.reference: [u1] The training will be held in the Chicago office.
issues.candidate: Training will take place at the Chicago office.

issues.reference: [u1] The proposal passed by a vote of seven to two.
issues.candidate: The proposal passed, seven votes to two.

issues.reference: [u1] Phase one includes billing and account migration only.
issues.candidate: Phase one is limited to billing and account migration.

issues.reference: [u1] The Thursday review was cancelled.
issues.candidate: The review planned for Thursday was cancelled.

issues.reference: [u1] Marketing agreed to reduce campaign spending by 15 percent.
issues.candidate: Marketing will cut campaign spending by 15 percent.

issues.reference: [u1] Elena will prepare the incident timeline.
issues.candidate: Elena owns preparation of the incident timeline.

issues.reference: [u1] Launch depends on completion of the security audit.
issues.candidate: The security audit must finish before launch.

issues.reference: [u1] The group issued a no-go decision for the June launch.
issues.candidate: The group decided not to launch in June.

issues.reference: [u1] Jordan committed to deliver the prototype next week.
issues.candidate: Jordan will deliver the prototype next week.

issues.reference: [u1] The security team required multifactor authentication for administrators.
issues.candidate: Administrators must use multifactor authentication.

issues.reference: [u1] Customer recordings must be deleted after 30 days.
issues.candidate: Customer recordings have a 30-day retention limit.

pairs.reference: [u1] The board approved a $2.4 million operating budget.
pairs.better: The board approved a $2.4 million operating budget.
pairs.worse: The board approved a $4.2 million operating budget.

pairs.reference: [u1] Priya owns the customer follow-up due Friday.
pairs.better: Priya owns the customer follow-up due Friday.
pairs.worse: The customer follow-up has no owner or deadline.

pairs.reference: [u1] The committee selected Northstar as the vendor.
pairs.better: Northstar was selected as the vendor.
pairs.worse: Bluewater was selected as the vendor.

pairs.reference: [u1] The proposal passed seven votes to two.
pairs.better: The proposal passed by seven votes to two.

pairs.reference: [u1] Launch depends on completion of the security audit.
pairs.better: The security audit must finish before launch.
pairs.worse: Launch can proceed without the security audit.

pairs.reference: [u1] The group issued a no-go decision for the June launch.
pairs.better: The group decided not to launch in June.
pairs.worse: The group approved the June launch.

pairs.reference: [u1] Customer recordings must be deleted after 30 days.
pairs.better: Customer recordings have a 30-day retention limit.
pairs.worse: Customer recordings may be retained indefinitely.
